title: Yijing Hexagram 48: Jing (The Well)
description: Hexagram 48 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 48 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Well. The town may be changed, but the well cannot be changed. It neither decreases nor increases.
